pageTitle: cyLegal advice before you submit the response
caption: cyRespond to a property possession claim
heading: cyCheck whether your client has had legal advice before you submit the response
secondaryHeading: cyRespond to a property possession claim
question: cyHas your client had any free legal advice?
hadLegalAdviceHint: cyWe’re asking this question so we can check defendants are getting the free support they’re entitled to. Your answer will not affect the outcome of the claim
paragraph1: cyHousing experts are ready and waiting to help defendants, and it takes just minutes to find one in your client’s area.
listItem1: cyVisit the find a legal adviser service Find a legal adviser service (opens in new tab).
listItem2: cyEnter your client’s postcode and select the 'Housing Loss Prevention Advice Service' and ‘Housing’ options.
listItem4: cyContact them to discuss your client’s options.
paragraph2: cyCivil Legal Advice (CLA) can also put your client in touch with a local expert. You can either:
bullet1: cycall 0345 345 4345. Lines are open Monday to Friday, from 9am to 8pm and Saturday from 9am to 12.30pm
bullet2: cytext ‘legalaid’ and your client’s name to 80010 to ask CLA to call back. This costs the same as a normal text message
subHeading2: cyHelp that might be available at the hearing
paragraph3: cyIf your client does not have their own legal adviser, they might be able to speak to a duty adviser (a legal professional who helps people at court) on the day of the hearing. If available, they can give advice and represent your client at the hearing for free.
paragraph4: cyIf your client wants to speak to the duty adviser, they should arrive at least 45 minutes before the hearing.

errors.hadLegalAdvice: cySelect if your client has had any free legal advice
